title: About Our Church
history:
Founded in 1950, our church has been a beacon of faith and community for over 70 years. We started as a small congregation meeting in a modest building, and through God's grace and the dedication of our members, we have grown into a vibrant community of believers.

Our church has always been committed to spreading the Gospel, serving our community, and nurturing spiritual growth. Over the decades, we have witnessed countless lives transformed by the power of God's love and the fellowship of believers.

Today, we continue to honor our heritage while embracing new ways to reach out and serve. Our mission remains the same: to glorify God, make disciples, and serve our community with love and compassion.
